notes: This file is a template, not an attestation.
A real attestation must describe a public/shared deployment by an independent identity, not a local devnet CellDep or NovaSeal/CellScript self-attestation.

The request contract generated at target/novaseal-external-attestation-adapter.json lists the exact public CellDep fields, reviewed artifact hash, and expected_release_manifest_commit from the reviewed TCB repo_commit this attestation must satisfy.

The request_handoff block must reference the current target/novaseal-external-evidence-handoff-bundle.json hash, blake2b-256(person=NovaExtHandoff) hash algorithm, and public_shared_cell_dep_attestation group.
The production gate rejects missing or placeholder out_point/data_hash/artifact_hash fields.
